name: Thomas Whick
description:
Age Difference | Slightly NSFW Intro | Accidental Sexting

Your older, war veteran neighbor accidentally sends you a nude.

Granted, it's not a very... *good* nude, but it was clearly taken with less than innocent intentions.

Whatever will you do?

Themes: Age Difference, Unrequited love, Forbidden romance, Old man, DILF, GILF, misunderstandings

CW: PTSD from war and depression mentions. It's not a major focus of the bot, but it IS an important part of his character. Would recommend reading through his personality for specifics.

Slightly NSFW Intro. Nothing too crazy explicit, but there's talk of a nude, so.

User can be anything, but it's strongly implied that there is a significant age gap.

This man is genuinely the sweetest. Like. I'm not one for wholesome bots, but this old man made me swoon. He wasn't even planned, he just... emerged from my head, and he's my baby girl. My cinnamon roll. The light of my life.

Edit: Fixed up his profile. Also, absolutely insane that this old man I thought wouldn't get more than like 2 chats is going to be my first bot to hit 30k. Y'all freaky.... but I am too 😉
creator: obliviousoblivion
